templates.name: Minimal
templates.author: glasshopper
templates.description: Bare React + TypeScript + Vite scaffold with the five core hooks wired. Start here.

templates.name: Aria
templates.author: glasshopper
templates.description: Single-room glance dashboard: greeting, climate, light and switch toggles, a 24h temperature curve, and scenes. Warm, calm, light-first.

templates.name: Grid
templates.author: glasshopper
templates.description: Compact Material 3 tile grid for many devices at a glance, grouped by area, tap to toggle. Light and dark.

templates.name: Pulse
templates.author: glasshopper
templates.description: Sensor and monitoring panel: live readouts with tabular numerals, animated sparklines, and a radial gauge. Quiet, data-forward, dark.
